comments.text: fwiw stuff like this is why I pay for the Trib. this is a really extensive report on plastics pollution in the Great Lakes that identifies industry malfeasance clearly and in detail. this kind of work is why we need well-resourced local newsrooms throughout the country.
As plastics clog the Great Lakes, industry presses to make more and downplays dangers, Tribune analysis finds
